content: What were our top support topics this week?
Billing questions were the most common topic this week, up 34% from last week. I can pull the full breakdown if you'd like.
Yes, please show me the breakdown.
Here's the breakdown: Billing (42%), Login issues (18%), Feature requests (15%), Bugs (12%), Other (13%).
Want me to compare this against last month's breakdown too?
Yes, and flag anything that changed by more than 10%.
Also include the trend for the last quarter if you have it.

Here's the query I used, in case you want to reproduce it:

```sql
SELECT date_trunc('week', created_at) AS week,
       topic,
       COUNT(*) AS tickets
FROM support_tickets
WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;
```

And the comparison you asked for:

| Topic | This week | Last month | Change |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Billing | 42% | 31% | +11% |
| Login issues | 18% | 20% | -2% |
| Feature requests | 15% | 17% | -2% |
| Bugs | 12% | 15% | -3% |
| Other | 13% | 17% | -4% |

Billing is the only topic that moved more than 10%.
Nice, can you drop the relevant links so I can dig in myself?

Sure — here's where to look:

- [Support ticket dashboard](https://example.com/dashboard)
- [Billing escalation runbook](https://example.com/runbook)
- [Weekly trend chart](https://example.com/trend-chart)

![Weekly ticket volume chart](https://placehold.co/480x240?text=Ticket+Volume)
